title: pinus massoniana var. henryi
intro: Pinus massoniana var. henryi, also known as Henry's masson pine, is a variety of coniferous tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of triterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Henry's masson pine include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the needles and seeds of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being.
